prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility patterns, I estimated a 3-day forecast using assumptions of moderate daily volatility (approximately 1-2% per day). The point estimate reflects a slight upward bias common in equity markets over short periods. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normal distribution of returns with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for the uncertainty that grows with the forecasting horizon.
